texto: Calling is connection: Uncovering our calling is a deliberate choice to serve others and to make a difference in the world. Our calling is made manifest in service to others...it is paradoxical but true; we are more likely to receive the meaning and fulfillment we seek when we enable others to achieve the meaning and fulfillment they seek, as well.
explicacao: Citação de David Shapiro sobre temas ligados a motivacao. “Calling is connection: Uncovering our calling is a deliberate choice to serve others and to make …” articula motivacao, calling, inspiracional em registro de motivacao, com relevância para contextos como inspiracao e trabalho.
